memory.summary: The strong odor from the roommate's unwashed clothes is severely disrupting my focus and sleep. Moving to a library desk would immediately restore my ability to concentrate for work.
Roommate R apologized and will address the odor immediately. This direct resolution alleviates my stress, though I remain focused on completing work at a library desk.
Library relocation protects focus but won't fix the odor or sleep debt without raising the issue tonight.
I made significant progress on the reading response, but my sleep debt and lingering odor stress still require immediate attention to maintain focus.
Roommate R returned to the room, presenting a new opportunity to address the odor directly before it escalates again.
Progress on the reading response increased to 0.80, yet my elevated stress and sleep debt remain critical barriers to sustained focus.
Reading response progress improved to 0.86 after two hours, but sleep debt and stress remain high. I rested well tonight.
Reading response progress improved to 0.91 in 1.5 hours, but high stress and 2 hours of sleep debt still hinder sustained focus.
Reading response progress advanced to 0.97 in two hours, yet high stress and 2 hours of sleep debt continue to impede sustained focus.
The reading response is now complete, but my high stress and two hours of sleep debt remain unchanged.
